cells.rationale: Extracting a shared provisioning seam and wiring it into every worktree-creation site across the hairy autopilot/baseline/worktree-git surface is contract-shaping, idiom-delicate work whose abstraction propagates into task 2, needing Claude-tuned judgment but no nameable opus trigger.

Byte-identity residue classification gates the recover pass's dirt/paging and can destroy real work if a plant is misclassified — a subtle correctness invariant with data-loss blast radius, a hard opus gate at contract-touching xhigh depth.
